tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits, indicating good glycemic and renal function. However, lipid profile shows elevated total cholesterol and LDL, and low HDL, which increases cardiovascular risk. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lipid-lowering therapy and lifestyle modification. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Regular monitoring advised.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
